use_cases: Comparing before/after images in e-commerce product listings
Showing property transformations in real estate listings
Displaying medical imaging comparisons in healthcare
Comparing original vs edited photos in media/photo editing apps
Demonstrating transformation effects in creative tool applications
ai_summary: A vertical image comparison slider component that displays two images stacked vertically and allows users to drag a handle to reveal and compare them. Supports both mouse and touch-based drag interactions with state management for slider position and dragging status. Designed for before/after comparisons across various industries including e-commerce, real estate, healthcare, and media applications.
